mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_sys_dept WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY sort_no, create_date
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_sys_dept (id, parent_id, name, leader, phone, sort_no, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{parentId}, #{name}, #{leader}, #{phone}, #{sortNo}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
mapper.update: UPDATE rp_sys_dept SET parent_id=#{parentId}, name=#{name}, leader=#{leader}, phone=#{phone}, sort_no=#{sortNo}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_date=#{updateDate}, flag=#{flag} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_sys_dict_type WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_sys_dict_type (id, name, code, status, remark, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{code}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
mapper.update: UPDATE rp_sys_dict_type SET name=#{name}, code=#{code}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_date=#{updateDate}, flag=#{flag} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_sys_dict_data WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY dict_code, sort_no
SELECT * FROM rp_sys_dict_data WHERE dict_code = #{dictCode} AND flag = '启用' ORDER BY sort_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_sys_dict_data (id, dict_code, label, value, sort_no, status, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{dictCode}, #{label}, #{value}, #{sortNo}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
mapper.update: UPDATE rp_sys_dict_data SET dict_code=#{dictCode}, label=#{label}, value=#{value}, sort_no=#{sortNo}, status=#{status}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_date=#{updateDate}, flag=#{flag} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_sys_oper_log WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY oper_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_sys_oper_log (id, module, action, method, request_url, operator, oper_ip, status, detail, oper_time, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{module}, #{action}, #{method}, #{requestUrl}, #{operator}, #{operIp}, #{status}, #{detail}, #{operTime}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_sys_login_log WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY login_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_sys_login_log (id, account, login_ip, location, browser, status, message, login_time, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{account}, #{loginIp}, #{location}, #{browser}, #{status}, #{message}, #{loginTime}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_sys_config WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY config_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_sys_config (id, config_key, config_value, name, remark, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{name}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
mapper.update: UPDATE rp_sys_config SET config_key=#{configKey}, config_value=#{configValue}, name=#{name}, remark=#{remark}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_date=#{updateDate}, flag=#{flag} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_sys_notice WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY publish_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_sys_notice (id, title, content, notice_type, status, publish_time, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{noticeType}, #{status}, #{publishTime}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
mapper.update: UPDATE rp_sys_notice SET title=#{title}, content=#{content}, notice_type=#{noticeType}, status=#{status}, publish_time=#{publishTime}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_date=#{updateDate}, flag=#{flag} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_sys_file WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_sys_file (id, file_name, original_name, file_path, file_size, mime_type, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{fileName}, #{originalName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
mapper.update: UPDATE rp_sys_file SET file_name=#{fileName}, original_name=#{originalName}, file_path=#{filePath}, file_size=#{fileSize}, mime_type=#{mimeType}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_date=#{updateDate}, flag=#{flag} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_sys_job WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_sys_job (id, job_name, job_group, cron_expression, bean_name, status, remark, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{jobName}, #{jobGroup}, #{cronExpression}, #{beanName}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
mapper.update: UPDATE rp_sys_job SET job_name=#{jobName}, job_group=#{jobGroup}, cron_expression=#{cronExpression}, bean_name=#{beanName}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_date=#{updateDate}, flag=#{flag} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_biz_order WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_biz_order (id, order_no, customer_name, product_name, amount, status, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{orderNo}, #{customerName}, #{productName}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
mapper.update: UPDATE rp_biz_order SET order_no=#{orderNo}, customer_name=#{customerName}, product_name=#{productName}, amount=#{amount}, status=#{status}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_date=#{updateDate}, flag=#{flag} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_biz_product WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_biz_product (id, sku, name, price, stock, status, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{sku}, #{name}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
mapper.update: UPDATE rp_biz_product SET sku=#{sku}, name=#{name}, price=#{price}, stock=#{stock}, status=#{status}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_date=#{updateDate}, flag=#{flag} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rp_biz_customer WHERE flag = '启用' ORDER BY create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rp_biz_customer (id, name, phone, email, level, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{level}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{flag})
mapper.update: UPDATE rp_biz_customer SET name=#{name}, phone=#{phone}, email=#{email}, level=#{level}, update_by=#{updateBy}, update_date=#{updateDate}, flag=#{flag} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rp_user WHERE flag = '启用') AS userCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rp_role WHERE flag = '启用') AS roleCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rp_menu WHERE flag = '启用') AS menuCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rp_permission WHERE flag = '启用') AS permissionCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rp_sys_dept WHERE flag = '启用') AS deptCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rp_biz_order WHERE flag = '启用') AS orderCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rp_biz_product WHERE flag = '启用') AS productCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rp_biz_customer WHERE flag = '启用') AS customerCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rp_form_definition WHERE flag = '启用') AS formDefCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rp_workflow_definition WHERE flag = '启用') AS workflowDefCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rp_workflow_task WHERE status = 'pending') AS todoTaskCount
